title: helichrysum asperum var. comosum
intro: Helichrysum asperum var. comosum, also known as the woolly everlasting daisy or woolly everlasting, is a flowering plant species within the Helichrysum genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and fighting off infections. The herbal preparations of Helichrysum asperum var. comosum include essential oils, tinctures, and infusions that can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
